title: ShipLua mod manifest (manifest.toml)
description: Schema for the manifest.toml every ShipLua mod ships at its root. This is a documentation/validation reference; the runtime parser (ManifestParser) implements the same rules in C++. Unknown/extra keys are ignored by the runtime for forward compatibility.

id.description: Globally unique mod identifier, reverse-DNS style recommended.

version.description: Mod version as a semver string.

api.description: ShipLua API version range this mod is compatible with.

entrypoint.description: Lua entrypoint file, relative to the mod directory.

description.description: Optional short description of the mod.

games.description: Games the mod targets. Omitted or empty means both.

requires_both_games.description: Link-Span-only hard requirement for both OoT and MM assets. When true the launcher refuses to start (exit code 8) unless assets for both games are present. Distinct from games=["oot","mm"], which means 'runs in either host'.

shipwright.description: Version range for Ship of Harkinian (OoT).

required.description: Capabilities that must be present or the mod fails to load.

dependencies.description: Map of dependency mod id -> version range.

load.description: Load-order hints. Full ordering resolution is a later milestone.

priority.description: Load priority; lower loads earlier. Default 50.

after.description: Mod ids this mod must load after.

before.description: Mod ids this mod must load before.

permissions.description: Sandbox permissions requested by the mod. All default to false.
